assets.title: IG Carousel — Financial Home Makeover (8 slides)
assets.bodyText:
Slide 1: Is Your Financial House Protected?
Slide 2: A policy is not always a plan.
Slide 3: Foundation: protect the income your family depends on.
Slide 4: Walls: protect the mortgage and household stability.
Slide 5: Roof: prepare for final expenses before crisis hits.
Slide 6: Emergency Plan: build retirement income options.
Slide 7: Legacy Room: leave clarity, not confusion.
Slide 8: Book your free Latimore Legacy Checkup.

Caption: Most families are doing their best — but many have never had someone review the whole financial house.

Life insurance, mortgage protection, final expense planning, retirement income, and legacy planning should not be random pieces. They should work together.

That is the purpose of a Latimore Legacy Checkup: to look at the gaps before life exposes them.

Protecting Today. Securing Tomorrow.

Message me or book a free consultation to review your protection plan.

#TheBeatGoesOn #LatimoreLifeLegacy #LifeInsurance #MortgageProtection #CoalRegion #FamilyProtection

assets.title: IG Reel Script — A Policy Is Not a Plan
assets.bodyText:
Hook: "Most families have a policy. Fewer have a plan."

Body: "A real protection plan answers five questions. What happens to the income? What happens to the house? What happens to final expenses? What happens to retirement income? And what kind of legacy is left behind?"

Close: "That is what I call the Financial Home Makeover. At Latimore Life & Legacy, we help families review the whole picture before life forces the conversation."

CTA: "Book your free Legacy Checkup."

assets.title: IG Text Post — A Policy Is Not Always a Plan
assets.bodyText:
Graphic headline: A Policy Is Not Always a Plan

Caption: A policy is one piece. A plan is the full picture.

Your family's protection plan should answer what happens to the income, the mortgage, final expenses, retirement income, and the legacy you are building.

That is why the Financial Home Makeover matters.

It is not about pressure. It is about preparation.

Book your free Latimore Legacy Checkup.

assets.title: X Thread — A Policy Is Not a Plan (7 posts)
assets.bodyText:
1/ A policy is not always a plan.
A real protection plan answers what happens when life changes — income, mortgage, final expenses, retirement, and legacy.

2/ Start with income.
If your paycheck stopped tomorrow, how long could your household stay stable?
That is the first protection question.

3/ Then look at the house.
Mortgage protection is not just about debt. It is about keeping your family from having to make rushed decisions during grief or crisis.

4/ Final expenses matter too.
A smaller policy can still make a major difference if it keeps loved ones from carrying the full burden alone.

5/ Retirement planning is part of protection.
The question is not only "How much did I save?"
It is also "How will I create income I can count on?"

6/ Legacy is clarity.
Beneficiaries. Instructions. Protection. Direction.
Do not leave confusion where you could leave a plan.

7/ That is the Financial Home Makeover.
At Latimore Life & Legacy, we help families review the whole picture before life forces the conversation.
Book your free Legacy Checkup.
#TheBeatGoesOn

assets.title: X Text Posts — Financial Home Makeover (3 options)
assets.bodyText:
Option 1: Most families do not fail because they lack a policy.
They struggle because the policy was never part of a full plan.
Income. Mortgage. Final expenses. Retirement. Legacy.
Review the whole house.

Option 2: Before you buy another policy, ask:
What problem is this solving?
A real protection plan should give your family options when life changes.

Option 3: Legacy is not just money.
Legacy is clarity, preparation, and making sure your family is not guessing during the hardest moments.

assets.title: LinkedIn Carousel — Financial Resilience Starts at Home (9 slides)
assets.bodyText:
Slide 1: Financial Resilience Starts at Home
Slide 2: Most families have financial products. Fewer have a coordinated protection plan.
Slide 3: Income protection is the foundation. Without income, every other obligation becomes harder.
Slide 4: Mortgage protection helps preserve household stability during loss or disruption.
Slide 5: Final expense planning reduces the burden placed on loved ones.
Slide 6: Retirement income planning protects the future paycheck.
Slide 7: Legacy planning creates clarity for the people who depend on you.
Slide 8: The goal is not more paperwork. The goal is more options.
Slide 9: Latimore Life & Legacy helps families review the whole financial house.

assets.title: LinkedIn Video Script — Financial Resilience Starts at Home
assets.bodyText:
Opening: "Financial protection is not just about buying a policy. It is about creating household stability."

Body: "When I talk about a Financial Home Makeover, I am talking about five areas: income protection, mortgage protection, final expense planning, retirement income, and legacy clarity.
Many families have one or two pieces in place. But the real question is whether those pieces work together.
If income stopped, would the household stay stable? If a parent passed away, would the mortgage still be manageable? If retirement started tomorrow, would there be a clear income strategy?"

Close: "At Latimore Life & Legacy, the goal is education first. We help families identify gaps before life exposes them."

CTA: "If you have not reviewed your protection plan recently, schedule a Legacy Checkup."

assets.title: LinkedIn Text Post — Financial Resilience Starts at Home
assets.bodyText:
Most families are one life event away from discovering whether their financial plan was actually a plan — or just a collection of policies.

That distinction matters.

A complete protection strategy should answer practical questions:
What happens to the household income? What happens to the mortgage? How are final expenses handled? Is there a retirement income plan? Will the family have clarity or confusion?

That is the idea behind the Financial Home Makeover.

It is a simple framework for reviewing the full picture: income protection, mortgage protection, final expense planning, retirement income, and legacy clarity.

For families in the Coal Region, this is not abstract. It is household stability. It is preparation. It is leadership.

At Latimore Life & Legacy, my goal is to help families protect today and secure tomorrow through education-first planning.

If you have not reviewed your protection plan recently, this is the right time to start.
